title: Raspi's Modpack Server Edition
description: Raspi's lag eliminator modpack but in server form!
body:
Notice: None of the mods in this pack were made by me, so make sure to check out the original creators in the dependencies tab.

Raspi's modpack is a great modpack to improve your Minecraft server experience! Packed with only the best mods, this modpack will convert your cheap laggy server to be lighting fast with minimal lag.

I hope you guys enjoy!

Check out my client side modpack: [Raspi's Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/raspis-modpack)

If you have any problems, DM me on discord at @raspi_dude or join the Raspi World discord to get help!

https://discord.gg/fTKZgy2AJa
